positive: A stylized, geometric forest scene with bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a meandering river flowing through the scene, bordered by crystalline, stylized trees and abstract, glowing mushrooms. The style is neo-art deco mixed with fantasy maximalism, featuring clean silhouettes and strong contrasts between deep indigo blues and neon turquoise accents. Composition is central and symmetrical, ideal for a repeating pattern or central placement on apparel. Lighting is dramatic and magical, emphasizing the glow emanating from the plant life. High detail, perfect for screen printing, 8k, highly detailed, flat vector art aesthetic mixed with depth.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, noise, text, watermark, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, bokeh, photorealism, muted colors
